testcase.name: test_infographic_generation_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 6 sections, got 2 assert 2 == 6 + where 2 = len([{'bullets': [], 'color': 'blue', 'headerImage': '...', 'icon': 'chart', ...}, {'bullets': ['Analysis generated from source documents'], 'color': 'green', 'icon': 'lightbulb', 'sectionNumber': 2, ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_infographic_scurve.py:52: in test_infographic_generation_structure assert len(sections) == 6, f"Expected 6 sections, got {len(sections)}" E AssertionError: Expected 6 sections, got 2 E assert 2 == 6 E + where 2 = len([{'bullets': [], 'color': 'blue', 'headerImage': '...', 'icon': 'chart', ...}, {'bullets': ['Analysis generated from source documents'], 'color': 'green', 'icon': 'lightbulb', 'sectionNumber': 2, ...}])
